message:
🌱 Add kube-rs: `kube-derive` does not create required `schemas` field for mission (#945)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kube-rs-264-kube-derive-does-not-create-required-schemas-field-for-customresourc",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kube-rs: `kube-derive` does not create required `schemas` field for CustomResourceDefinition ",
+    "description": "`kube-derive` does not create required `schemas` field for CustomResourceDefinition . Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kube-rs project",
+        "description": "Verify your kube-rs version and configuration:\n```bash\ncargo --version\nrustc --version\ngrep kube Cargo.toml 2>/dev/null\n```\nThis feature requires a Rust development environment with the kube-rs crate as a dependency."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kube-rs configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kube-rs configuration:\n```bash\ngrep -A5 '\\[dependencies\\]' Cargo.toml\ncargo tree | grep kube\n```\nWith `apiextensions.k8s.io/v1` the definition of a structural schema is mandatory for CustomResourceDefinitions, while in `v1beta1` this is still optional."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for `kube-derive` does not create required `schemas` field for\u2026",
+        "description": "Schema is generated with `schemars`.\n\nAlso fixed the location of `subresources` and `additionalPrinterColumns`.\r\n\n---\n\nFor deriving CRD v1, the spec struct must include `schemars::JsonSchema`. ~~The schemas for subresources are currently not generated, but it should be possible to add the status\n```yaml\napply error: ErrorResponse { status: \"Failure\", message: \"Incorrect version specified in apply patch. Specified patch version: apiextensions.k8s.io/v1beta1, expected: apiextensions.k8s.io/v1\", reason: \"BadRequest\", code: 400 }\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\ncargo build 2>&1 | tail -20\ncargo test 2>&1 | tail -20\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"`kube-derive` does not create required `schemas` field for\u2026\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Schema is generated with `schemars`.\n\nAlso fixed the location of `subresources` and `additionalPrinterColumns`.\r\n\n---\n\nFor deriving CRD v1, the spec struct must include `schemars::JsonSchema`.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apply error: ErrorResponse { status: \"Failure\", message: \"Incorrect version specified in apply patch. Specified patch version: apiextensions.k8s.io/v1beta1, expected: apiextensions.k8s.io/v1\", reason: \"BadRequest\", code: 400 }",
+        "use k8s_openapi::apiextensions_apiserver::pkg::apis::apiextensions::v1beta1::CustomResourceDefinition;",
+        "Fortunately, the workaround is easy, just create the YAML myself:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
